- [P2] `pages/live.html:418-426` ŌĆö `refreshStatus()` only renders wallet chips when `agentA/B.configured`; with neither configured (prod default) `#wallets` stays silently empty with no message. Render a "wallets not configured" chip.
- [P2] `pages/live.html:512-521` + `api/demo/economy.js:178` ŌĆö on a real underfunded-wallet error the only feedback is one gray `ERROR` log line; the button resets with no recovery (no fundable address). For a payment surface this insufficient-funds state should be designed ŌĆö surface the address + retry.
- [P3] `pages/live.html:259-265` ŌĆö page shows two agents trading but links nowhere (`/agents`, `/launches`, trader/oracle profiles). Link the agent tags to profiles.
- [P3] `pages/live.html:267-273,429-439` ŌĆö speech bubbles depend on `llmSay()` ŌåÆ `/api/chat`; on failure it returns `''` and the agent stays silent, making the "live" world look dead during a chat outage. Fall back to a static persona line.

---

## Group summary

No P0 issues. **Coin rule is clean across all 13 pages** ŌĆö no hardcoded non-$THREE mint or ticker anywhere; the only hardcoded mints are USDC (allowed plumbing) and the correct $THREE CA. The three vanity grinders are all genuinely real cryptographic grinding in Web Workers (WASM ed25519 for Solana, Profanity-hardened `@noble` secp256k1 with self-verification for EVM EOA, real keccak CREATE2 salt search) ŌĆö keys client-side, no faked results.

Top P1s (reachable but incomplete / integrity):

1. `/play/agent-wallet` `src/play-agent-wallet.js:35-43` ŌĆö pay flow is DEAD in production; `BRIDGE_URL` is empty for non-localhost, so the headline "your avatar pays" promise is unreachable for every real visitor. Needs a hosted bridge/facilitator.
2. `/demo` `api/demo-economy.js:81-107` ŌĆö hardcoded fake-marketplace array rendered as a live bazaar with no fallback indication (direct "no sample arrays in prod" violation).
3. `/live` `pages/live.html:525` + `api/demo/economy.js:161` ŌĆö anonymous "demo mode" still shows "settled on-chain" success copy though no payment occurs; misrepresents the outcome.
4. `/avatar-wallet-chat:583` ŌĆö governance "Trust Layer" chip links to unrouted `/ibm/trust-layer` (dead link, shown exactly when a send is blocked).
5. `/lookup` ŌĆö ships a hardcoded light theme with no nav/footer (off-brand white page) and dead-ends to external explorers with no on-platform agent-profile link.
6. `/eth-vanity` ŌĆö stale/inaccurate "ThreeWSFactoryŌĆ”on BSC" share metadata, and missing `footer.css` (footer renders unstyled).

Notable P2 cluster: undefined `--danger`/`--success` CSS tokens shared by the vanity assign blocks; eth-vanity invisible white-on-white prefix highlight; per-send leaking `setInterval` pollers (`avatar-wallet-chat`, plus decorative scan-line intervals on the grinders); several "island" pages (arena, demo, live, agent-wallet) with no cross-link to `/agents` / `/launches` / agent profiles.

---

<a id="sec-078"></a>

> **Source:** `docs/audits/06-labs-agent-account.md` ┬Ę [Ōåæ table of contents](#table-of-contents)

# Audit ŌĆö Labs, Agent Tools & Account pages

Senior-engineer code + UX audit. Scope: `/launchpad /brain /lipsync /lipsync/mic /playground /labs /avatar-artifact /chat /agent /agents /my-agents /reputation /login /register /forgot-password /dashboard /dashboard/account /dashboard/analytics /dashboard/settings /settings`.

Method: route ŌåÆ file resolved via `vite.config.js` `fileMap` + `vercel.json`; read each page HTML and its primary JS module; grepped for mock/sample/setTimeout/TODO/placeholder and for non-$THREE token addresses/tickers. Claims from sub-agents were spot-verified on disk.

Verdict in one line: **the group is in strong shape ŌĆö real APIs throughout, no coin-rule violations, no mock data shipped. The only genuinely broken thing is `/avatar-artifact` on mobile. Most remaining items are P2/P3 polish.**

---

## /launchpad ŌĆö pages/launchpad.html
Loads and wires cleanly; real publish/get endpoints.
- [P3] `pages/launchpad.html:52` ŌĆö imports `mountLaunchpadStudio` from `/src/editor/launchpad-studio.js` (exists). Hydrates from `?template/?slug/?wallet/?avatar` query params with validation in the module. No issues found. ŌĆö n/a.

## /brain ŌĆö pages/brain.html (+ src/brain.js)
Real multi-LLM wiring confirmed; no canned responses.
- [P0-CLEARED] `src/brain.js:706` ŌĆö POSTs to real `/api/brain/chat`; `:576` GETs the provider list from the same function (13 real providers in `api/brain/chat.js`). The "must hit real model endpoints" requirement is met. ŌĆö no fix.
- [P3] `pages/brain.html:87,178` ŌĆö `#brDescribeGenerate` / `#brSaveToAgent` ship disabled; correctly gated by input + agent-select state in JS, not dead. ŌĆö leave as-is.

## /lipsync ŌĆö public/demos/lipsync-tts.html
Real streaming TTS + viseme pipeline.
- [P0-CLEARED] `public/demos/lipsync-tts.html:266` ŌĆö real `fetch('/api/tts/speak', ŌĆ”)` with `{text,voice,speed,format}`; loads real `/avatars/default.glb`. No mocks. ŌĆö no fix.
- [P3] No persistent error toast if `/api/tts/speak` returns non-200 mid-stream; status text only. ŌĆö add an inline error state with retry.

## /lipsync/mic ŌĆö public/demos/lipsync-mic.html
Real mic capture + analyser; responsive.
- [P0-CLEARED] `public/demos/lipsync-mic.html:106` ŌĆö imports real `LipSyncAnalyser` from `/src/lip-sync-analyser.js` (exists); uses `getUserMedia` + `AnalyserNode`. No mock audio. ŌĆö no fix.
- [P2] No explicit designed state for `getUserMedia` permission-denied / no-mic-device; failure path is thin. ŌĆö add a designed "microphone blocked ŌĆö enable access" empty/error state.

## /playground ŌĆö pages/playground.html
`<model-viewer>` + drag-drop upload; responsive at 768px.
- [P3] `pages/playground.html:841` ŌĆö `DEFAULT_SRC`/`DEFAULT_NAME` hardcoded to `/avatars/default.glb` (acceptable default, not data). ŌĆö n/a.
- [P3] Upload validation is type/extension-based only; add size cap + friendlier reject message. ŌĆö minor.

## /labs ŌĆö pages/labs.html (+ src/labs.js)
Registry-driven gallery with real liveness checks and full state set.
- [P0-CLEARED] `src/labs.js:4` ŌĆö fetches `/features.json` at runtime; `:30` does real HEAD liveness checks (3s timeout). Skeleton + empty + error(retry) states all present (`pages/labs.html:432-493`), `aria-busy`/`aria-live` set. Exemplary. ŌĆö no fix.

## /avatar-artifact ŌĆö pages/avatar-artifact.html
**Broken on mobile ŌĆö the one real defect in this group.**
- [P1] `pages/avatar-artifact.html` (whole file) ŌĆö **zero `@media` queries** (confirmed: `grep -c @media` = 0). Full-bleed Three.js canvas sizes to `window.innerWidth/Height` (`:70`, `:391`) with no mobile adaptation, no nav, no footer, no links ŌĆö a dead-end standalone canvas. On small screens there is no readable UI and no way out. ŌĆö add a responsive layer: a minimal header/back-link, a mobile fallback or reduced-quality path, and touch handling (current interaction is `mousemove`-only, `:312`).
- [P2] `pages/avatar-artifact.html:14-27` ŌĆö no `focus-visible`, no keyboard interaction, mouse-only; no loading state while the GLB/CDN Three.js resolves. ŌĆö add focus/keyboard affordances and a loading indicator.
- [P3] CDN Three.js loaded with SRI (`:65`) ŌĆö good; consider same-origin to match the rest of the app. ŌĆö optional.

## /chat ŌĆö chat/index.html (Svelte sub-app)
Real built Svelte app; not a mock.
- [P2] `chat/index.html` ŌĆö entry is a built bundle (`chat/src/*.svelte` is the real source, e.g. `AgentPicker.svelte`, `ClientTool.svelte`). Wiring to real endpoints can't be proven from the static shell alone. ŌĆö verify at runtime (`/verify`) that model/agent calls hit real `/api/*`, not a dev stub, before relying on this audit line.

## /agent ŌĆö public/agent/index.html (bare `/agent` 301s ŌåÆ `/agents`)
Real agent token page; ownership-gated; widget mounts only for launched mints.
- [P0-CLEARED] Real calls to `/api/agents/{id}`, `/api/oembed`, `/api/agent/{id}/og`; imports `AgentIdentity`/`AgentHome`/`AgentTokenWidget` from `/src/pump/*` (exist). Coin widget uses the official `THREE_MINT` constant ŌĆö coin rule clean. ŌĆö no fix.
- [P2] `public/agent/index.html` ŌĆö **0 `@media` queries** (confirmed). Layout uses relative/inline styles so it degrades rather than breaks, but it isn't explicitly designed for narrow screens. ŌĆö add breakpoints for the identity/embed columns.

## /agents ŌĆö public/agents/index.html
Real public directory; pagination/search/sort; actionable empty state.
- [P0-CLEARED] `:170` `const API='/api/agents/public'`; cursor pagination; cards link via API `home_url` ŌåÆ agent detail. Empty state `:258` "No public agents yet ŌĆö Create the first one ŌåÆ" ŌåÆ `/create-agent` (real route). ŌĆö no fix.
- [P3] Sort dropdown + grid have `aria-label`/`aria-busy`; consider keyboard focus order audit on card actions. ŌĆö minor.

## /my-agents ŌĆö public/my-agents/index.html
Auth-gated; native + ERC-8004 imported agents; both signed-out and empty states designed.
- [P0-CLEARED] Signed-out (`:145`) redirects to `/login?next=`; empty (`:168`) "Create an agent" ŌåÆ `/create-agent`. Real `/api/agents`, `/api/erc8004/hydrate`, `/api/erc8004/import`. View ŌåÆ `home_url || /agent/${id}`; Edit/Deploy ŌåÆ `/agent/{id}/edit`. Cross-wiring correct. ŌĆö no fix.

## /reputation ŌĆö public/reputation/index.html
Real ERC-8004 / EAS explorer; wallet-gated writes; per-chain queries.
- [P0-CLEARED] Reads via EAS GraphQL per chain; writes require `window.ethereum` and submit signed attestations; ENS resolution supported; no demo contracts/coins. Form validation (star picker, char count, gated submit). ŌĆö no fix.
- [P3] Base Sepolia is in the chain list for testing ŌĆö fine (it's a chain, not a coin), but make the "testnet" labeling explicit in the UI so reviewers aren't surprised. ŌĆö minor copy.

## /login ŌĆö public/login.html
Real auth; cross-links correct. **Sub-agent P0 was a false positive.**
- [P0-CLEARED] `:735` loads `/src/privy-login.js` ŌĆö **exists** at `src/privy-login.js` (13 KB); Vite serves `src/` at the `/src/` URL root, so Privy email-OTP + wallet login are wired, not broken. (Sub-agent only checked `public/src/`.) Email/password POST to real `api/auth/[action].js`. ŌĆö no fix.
- [P1] `:972` ŌĆö `setTimeout(() => location.href = next, 2000)` delays the post-login redirect 2s for an avatar animation; user can navigate away mid-window. ŌĆö use `location.replace` and/or fire redirect on animation-end, not a fixed timer.
- [P1] `:913` ŌĆö already-authenticated check (`/api/auth/me`) swallows errors with `.catch(()=>{})`; on a network blip a logged-in user just sees the login form with no signal. ŌĆö surface a transient "couldn't verify session" notice.
- [P2] `:944` ŌĆö generic "Email or password is incorrect" (good anti-enumeration); `role="alert"` + `aria-describedby` present. ŌĆö fine.

## /register ŌĆö public/register.html
Real registration; password strength + username validation. Same Privy note as login (resolves, not broken).
- [P1] `:799-806` ŌĆö no already-authenticated redirect (login has one); a logged-in user can re-open the signup form. ŌĆö add the `/api/auth/me` check + redirect for parity.
- [P2] `:809-814` ŌĆö structured handling for 409 (taken) / 429 (rate-limit), else generic "Registration failed". ŌĆö map a couple more server error codes to human copy.
- [P2] `:820` ŌĆö immediate redirect on success vs login's 2s delay ŌĆö inconsistent UX. ŌĆö pick one pattern.

## /forgot-password ŌĆö public/forgot-password.html
Real reset endpoint; privacy-preserving response.
- [P1] `:294-295` ŌĆö the catch block shows the same "if an account existsŌĆ”" success message on a genuine network failure, so a user whose request never reached the server believes it did. (The always-200 success on the happy path is intentional anti-enumeration and fine.) ŌĆö distinguish network/transport failure from the server's privacy response and show a retry on the former.
- [P2] `:252-264` ŌĆö real-time email validity hint; `:268` label focus effect. ŌĆö fine.

## /dashboard ŌĆö pages/dashboard-next/index.html ŌåÆ src/dashboard-next/pages/home.js
Real data pipeline; `requireUser()` gate; skeleton/empty/error states.
- [P0-CLEARED] `requireUser()` (`api.js:96`) redirects 401 ŌåÆ `/login`. Real `/api/avatars|agents|widgets|billing/revenue|oracle/*` via `Promise.allSettled` with null fallbacks. Oracle feed renders mints from API, not hardcoded. ŌĆö no fix.
- [P2] `home.js:743-789` ŌĆö typewriter uses chained `setTimeout` for animation only (not fake loading); could be one RAF loop. ŌĆö minor refactor.

## /dashboard/account ŌĆö pages/dashboard-next/account.html ŌåÆ account.js
Real CRUD (wallets, profile, provider keys, delegation); validation present.
- [P2] `account.js` (delegation table) ŌĆö "Configure ŌåÆ" is a `#delegation` hash anchor; no matching console/modal located in this module. ŌĆö confirm the target section exists or wire the modal; otherwise it's a dead in-page link.
- [P3] `:201` audit-log CSV export handles a 404 when the endpoint isn't deployed ŌĆö good defensive UX. ŌĆö n/a.

## /dashboard/analytics ŌĆö pages/dashboard-next/analytics.html ŌåÆ analytics.js
Real revenue/agent/widget data; canvas charts animated via rAF; designed error/empty.
- [P0-CLEARED] Real `/api/billing/revenue`, `/api/widgets/:id/stats`, `/api/monetization/revenue`; full-null ŌåÆ error state with retry (`:70`). Charts are real-time animated, not fake progress. ŌĆö no fix.

## /dashboard/settings ŌĆö pages/dashboard-next/settings.html ŌåÆ settings.js
Sessions, LLM usage, storage meter, prefs, theme, export ŌĆö all persisted to real endpoints.
- [P0-CLEARED] Real `/api/auth/sessions`, `/api/notifications`, `/api/dashboard/prefs`; revoke / revoke-others wired; storage meter from real quota. ŌĆö no fix.
- [P3] Theme writes to both server prefs and localStorage (cross-device + offline) ŌĆö good. ŌĆö n/a.

## /settings ŌĆö public/settings/index.html (standalone, top-level route)
Comprehensive account settings; real auth guard; tabbed with popstate.
- [P0-CLEARED] `apiFetch` 401 ŌåÆ `/login` (`:546`); profile PATCH, sessions revoke, GitHub/X connect, account-delete (typed-confirmation `:725` ŌåÆ `DELETE /api/auth/me`). Responsive at 768px (`:277`). USDC referenced as settlement currency only ŌĆö coin rule clean. ŌĆö no fix.

---

## Group summary

**Coin rule: PASS across all 20 pages.** No non-$THREE token/coin/mint hardcoded in source, copy, or sample data. The only token references are the official `THREE_MINT` constant (agent token widget), USDC as a settlement-currency word, and runtime API/oracle feeds rendering user data ŌĆö all sanctioned.

**Real-data / no-mock: PASS.** Every page hits real endpoints (`/api/brain/chat`, `/api/tts/speak`, `/api/agents/public`, `/api/auth/*`, dashboard `/api/*`). No demo sample arrays, no fake `setTimeout` loaders masquerading as progress, no `throw 'not implemented'`, no TODO/stub found in shipped paths. `setTimeout` appears only for genuine animation timing.

**Top P1 (reachable but incomplete) ŌĆö 5:**
1. `/avatar-artifact` ŌĆö zero media queries; full-screen canvas with no nav, no mobile UI, mouse-only interaction ŌåÆ effectively broken on phones (`pages/avatar-artifact.html`).
2. `/login` ŌĆö 2s `setTimeout` redirect window after success lets the user navigate away mid-flow (`:972`).
3. `/login` ŌĆö already-authenticated `/api/auth/me` check swallows network errors silently (`:913`).
4. `/register` ŌĆö missing the already-authenticated redirect that login has; logged-in users can re-open signup (`:799`).
5. `/forgot-password` ŌĆö network failure shows the same success message as the privacy response, so failed requests look sent (`:294`).

**P0: 0 genuine.** The sub-agent's `/login` + `/register` "missing `/src/privy-login.js`" P0 was a **false positive** ŌĆö the file exists at `src/privy-login.js` and Vite serves it at `/src/privy-login.js`. Verified on disk.

**Notable strengths:** `/labs` (full skeleton/empty/error + aria + real liveness checks) and the entire `/dashboard*` suite (clean `requireUser()` auth gating, `Promise.allSettled` resilience, designed empty/error states) are reference-quality.

**Follow-up worth doing:** runtime-verify `/chat` (built Svelte bundle ŌĆö static audit can't prove endpoint wiring) and confirm the `/dashboard/account` `#delegation` anchor has a real target.

---

<a id="sec-079"></a>

> **Source:** `docs/audits/07-learn-blog-legal.md` ┬Ę [Ōåæ table of contents](#table-of-contents)

# Audit 07 ŌĆö Learn / Blog / Legal / Machine-readable

Scope: docs (learn), tutorials, status, support, glossary, events, blog (index + 6 sampled posts), legal, and machine-readable files. Read-only content+UX audit. Routing resolved via `vite.config.js` (`vercel-rewrites` fileMap) and `vercel.json`.

Date: 2026-06-18.

**Headline:** Coin rule is CLEAN across every audited surface ŌĆö the only Solana mint anywhere is `$THREE` (`FeMbDoX7R1Psc4GEcvJdsbNbZA3bfztcyDCatJVJpump`). Zero P0. Machine files are all wired (generated or function-backed and non-empty). The real problems are content-layer: a blog footer regression on ~22 posts, dead `/ibm/*` links, two orphaned `.md` posts, one orphaned doc, and a likely-dead RSS subscribe link.

---

## Learn ŌĆö docs

### /docs ŌĆö docs/index.html
Healthy SPA doc viewer. Renders markdown by slug, ships shared nav + footer (`/footer.js`, docs/index.html:1095-1096), default slug `start-here` (line 852). No issues.

### /docs/start-here ŌĆö docs/start-here.md
Alive, in nav. Links `/discover`, `/start` resolve. No issues.

### /docs/make-your-agent ŌĆö docs/make-your-agent.md
Alive, in nav. Links `/start`, `/app` resolve. No issues.

### /docs/share-and-embed ŌĆö docs/share-and-embed.md
Alive, in nav. Link `/studio` resolves. No issues.

### /docs/do-i-need-crypto ŌĆö docs/do-i-need-crypto.md
Alive. $THREE referenced with correct CA; USDC correctly framed as payment rail not a traded coin (lines 60-63). No issues.

### /docs/quick-start ŌĆö docs/quick-start.md
Alive. `npm install @three-ws/sdk` (line 55) matches `sdk/package.json`. No issues.

### /docs/agent-system ŌĆö docs/agent-system.md
Alive, in nav (line 763). No issues.

### /docs/erc8004 ŌĆö docs/erc8004.md
Alive, in nav (line 779). Base58-looking strings (lines 90/94/576/582) are `0x` EVM hex fragments, not Solana mints ŌĆö not coin violations. No issues.

### /docs/embedding ŌĆö docs/embedding.md
Alive. Internal link `/docs/ar` (line 277) ŌåÆ `ar.md` exists and `ar` is in nav. No issues.

### /docs/web-component ŌĆö docs/web-component.md
Alive. `/docs/ar` links resolve; React/Vite sample imports correct. No issues.

### /docs/mcp ŌĆö docs/mcp.md
Alive, in nav (line 796). No issues.

### /docs/skills ŌĆö docs/skills.md
Alive, in nav (line 765). No issues.

### /docs/widgets ŌĆö public/docs-widgets.html
Alive standalone page (17 KB), registered in nav (docs/index.html:801) and top-nav `/widgets`. No coin hits. No issues.

### /docs/api-reference ŌĆö docs/api-reference.md
Alive, in nav (line 793). Base URL, openapi/x402/mcp well-known links valid.
- [P3] docs/api-reference.md:74,256,ŌĆ” ŌĆö example payloads use "2025" timestamps while current date is 2026-06-18 ŌĆö cosmetic; refresh sample timestamps if desired.

### /docs/sdk ŌĆö docs/sdk.md
Alive, in nav (line 797).
- [P3] docs/sdk.md:62-120 ŌĆö `from './src/lib.js'` relative imports appear before the published-package (`@three-ws/sdk`) section. Intentional self-host path, but a skimming reader could copy the wrong import. Consider leading with the npm import.

### /docs/listings ŌĆö docs/listings.md
Alive, in nav (line 830). External links (IBM Community, HackerNoon, Alibaba Cloud) well-formed; internal `/news/partnered-with-hackernoon` and the Alibaba blog post resolve.
- [P2] docs/listings.md:42 ŌĆö inline link `/docs/syndication#hackernoon`. `syndication.md` exists and renders by slug, but `syndication` is NOT in the docs/index.html nav array ŌĆö reachable only via this one inline link (orphaned doc). Fix: add a nav entry for Syndication.

---

## Learn ŌĆö interactive

### /tutorials ŌĆö pages/tutorials.html
Manifest-driven index (28 tutorials from `public/tutorials-manifest.js`), fully populated, hover/focus states present. CTA links (`/create`, `/studio`, `/widgets`, `/discover`, `/docs`, `/blog`, `/dashboard`, `/legal/*`) all resolve. No fetch ŌåÆ no async state needed (synchronous classic script). No issues.

### /tutorials/<slug> ŌĆö pages/tutorial.html (text-to-3d, image-to-3d, prompts-for-3d, generate-3d-api)
Viewer hydrates from `/docs/tutorials/${slug}.md` (line 1319). All 4 target slugs have backing markdown (`docs/tutorials/*.md`) + manifest entries ŌĆö no orphan routes. Designed error state with recovery link (lines 1361-1367); prev/next pager wired.
- [P3] docs/tutorials/text-to-3d.md:51, generate-3d-api.md:166 ŌĆö link to third-party generators Meshy/Tripo. Legitimate BYO-key Forge engine options (real feature, not coins), accurately documented. Noted only as the sole competitor-link mentions.

### /status ŌĆö pages/status.html
Real uptime page. Fetches `GET /api/status` (line 351), refreshes every 5 min. Endpoint exists (`api/status.js`) and computes from probe history written by `api/cron/uptime-check.js`. No hardcoded "all operational" ŌĆö banner derived from `data.services` (lines 286-298). Loading skeleton (lines 257-268), warming-up empty state (line 287), designed error state with retry + `@trythreews` link (lines 340-347); respects `prefers-reduced-motion`. Exemplary. No issues.

### /support ŌĆö pages/support.html
Every contact path real and resolving. GitHub Issues (line 158) + Discussions (167) live. mailto links valid: support@/security@/partnerships@/privacy@/legal@/dmca@/abuse@ (lines 183-221). Copy-to-clipboard uses real `navigator.clipboard` with mailto fallback (lines 306-339) ŌĆö no fake timers. Doc/product links (README, SUPPORT.md, npm, `/ibm`, `/docs`) resolve except `/ibm` (see blog note below ŌĆö bare `/ibm` has no route).
- [P2] pages/support.html ŌĆö link to `/ibm` (bare) has no vercel.json route or file (only `/ibm/x402-demo` is routed). Dead link. Fix: point at `/ibm/x402-demo` or a real IBM landing page, or remove.

### /glossary ŌĆö pages/glossary.html
Wired to real data (`/src/glossary/page.js` + `public/glossary.js`), live search, deep-linkable `#term` anchors, designed empty state ("No terms matchŌĆ”", `role="status"`). No issues.

### /events/build-3d-agents-live ŌĆö pages/events/build-3d-agents-live.html
Correctly framed as upcoming. Event date 2026-06-23 (JSON-LD lines 45-46, JS 299-300) ŌĆö 5 days after today; single source drives countdown, Google Calendar link, and LIVE-NOW/replay transition. Live `<agent-3d src="/avatars/default.glb">` asset exists. RSVP uses real `data-newsletter-form` handler. IBM partnership link points to a real external IBM Community blog. No issues.

---

## /blog/*

Sampled 6 posts: `see-your-3d-in-ar` (newest, 2026-06-13), `solana-wallet-integration` (oldest, 2026-04-30), `three-ws-google-cloud-partnership`, `pumpfun-agent-payments-sdk` (SDK), `how-to-embed-3d-onchain-agents` (tutorial), `three-ws-ibm-collaboration`. Plus blog/index.html and full-corpus greps.

Verdict: Coin rule CLEAN across all 30 files (only `$THREE`/`$three` + correct CA). Index is solid. Systemic footer regression and several dead `/ibm/*` links are the main issues.

- [P0] None. Coin grep returned only `$THREE`/`$three` and CA `FeMbDoX7R1Psc4GEcvJdsbNbZA3bfztcyDCatJVJpump`. Lowercase `$three` (e.g. three-ws-dextools-social-boost-buyback.html:6) is still $THREE ŌĆö fine.
- [P2] blog/three-ws-ibm-collaboration.html, three-ws-ibm-business-partner.html ŌĆö dead internal links to `/ibm`, `/ibm/galaxy`, `/ibm/oracle`, `/ibm/proof`, `/ibm/trust-layer`, `/ibm/vision`. Confirmed: no vercel.json route and no files; `pages/ibm/` only contains `x402-demo.html` (only `/ibm/x402-demo` is routed at vercel.json:778). Fix: create the pages or repoint links.
- [P2] Footer missing on ~22 of 28 posts ŌĆö e.g. solana-wallet-integration.html:99, pumpfun-agent-payments-sdk.html:104, how-to-embed-3d-onchain-agents.html:164, three-ws-google-cloud-partnership.html:93. They load `/footer.css` (line 22) but have NO `<div id="footer-container">` and NO `/footer.js`, so the site footer never renders (dead CSS load, no bottom nav). Only ~6 posts render it. Fix: append footer-container + footer.js to the affected posts.
- [P2] blog/decision-optimization-3d-ai-crypto.md, blog/internets-second-species.md ŌĆö orphaned/unreachable. Route regex (vercel.json:3175) `/blog/([a-z0-9-]+)/?` ŌåÆ `/blog/$1.html` only; neither `.md` has an `.html` sibling and neither is linked from index.html, so they cannot be served. Fix: render to `.html` or delete.
- [P2] RSS subscribe link `/rss/announcements.xml` (index.html:9,61 and several posts) ŌĆö no generator writes `public/rss/announcements.xml`; not in source, public/, or dist/. Scripts reference the URL but only emit an archive JSON. Likely dead (note: vercel.json:299-304 rewrites `/rss/announcements.xml` and `/rss.xml` ŌåÆ `/api/rss/announcements`, so prod MAY serve it dynamically ŌĆö verify the function exists before treating as broken). Fix: confirm `api/rss/announcements` function returns valid XML, or add an emit step.
- [P3] blog/three-ws-play-coin-communities.html exists and is URL-reachable but is NOT linked from index.html (26 listed, this one omitted) ŌĆö orphaned from discovery. Fix: add to index.
- [P3] index.html:78 AR-post summary says "a QR code gets you there" while body see-your-3d-in-ar.html:73 says "no QR code to hunt for" ŌĆö minor copy contradiction.
- Images: no `<img>` in post bodies; all `og:image` ŌåÆ `https://three.ws/og-image.png` which exists. Shared assets present.

---

## Legal

### /legal/privacy ŌĆö public/legal/privacy.html
Solid. Route OK (vercel.json:3338 `/legal/privacy/?` ŌåÆ file). Real complete content (11 sections, 8.5KB, no lorem). Coin grep clean. Links to tos, mailto contacts, `/three.svg`, `/brand.js` resolve. Effective date April 27, 2026.
- [P3] public/legal/privacy.html:123 ŌĆö footer "Home" link points to `/marketplace?tab=mine` instead of `/` (TOS uses `/`). Cosmetic mislabel.

### /legal/tos ŌĆö public/legal/tos.html
Solid. Route OK (vercel.json:3342). Real content (12 sections, 7.4KB). Coin grep clean. Links resolve. Effective date April 27, 2026.
- [P3] public/legal/tos.html:6 vs :36/:43 ŌĆö `<title>` says "Terms of Service" but `og:title`/`twitter:title` say "Terms of Use". Inconsistent metadata. Cosmetic.

---

## Machine-readable

### /sitemap.xml ŌĆö api/sitemap.js (function)
Served dynamically: vercel.json:3132 `/sitemap.xml` ŌåÆ `/api/sitemap`. Function exists (`api/sitemap.js`, 3.3KB) and reads `data/pages.json`; per-type sub-sitemaps via `api/sitemap/[type].js`. Non-empty. No issues.

### /llms.txt ŌĆö public/llms.txt
Served from generated static file: vercel.json:3179 ŌåÆ `/llms.txt` (= public/llms.txt, 67 KB, generated by `scripts/build-page-index.mjs`). NOT the empty root `llms.txt`. No issues.
- [P3] Repo-root `llms.txt` (0 bytes) and `docs/llms.txt` / `docs/llms-full.txt` ("PlaceholderŌĆ”") are stale/unused files ŌĆö NOT served (the served copies live in public/). Harmless but dead; delete to avoid confusion.

### /llms-full.txt ŌĆö public/llms-full.txt
Served (vercel.json:3187), 72 KB, generated. No issues.

### /robots.txt ŌĆö public/robots.txt
Served (vercel.json:3128). 606 bytes, real disallow rules, points Sitemap at https://three.ws/sitemap.xml and references llms.txt. No issues.

### /openapi.json ŌĆö api/openapi-json.js (function)
Served dynamically: vercel.json:307 `/openapi.json` ŌåÆ `/api/openapi-json`. Function exists (35 KB), advertises only x402 (the rail actually settled). Non-empty. No issues.

### /.well-known/x402 ŌĆö api/wk.js (function)
Served: vercel.json:359 `/.well-known/x402` ŌåÆ `/api/wk?name=x402`; `x402` and `x402-discovery` handlers present in api/wk.js (63 KB). Static `public/.well-known/` also has openapi.yaml, agent cards, security.txt, etc. Non-empty. No issues.

---

## Group summary

**P0 (0):** None. Coin rule clean everywhere; all critical machine files non-empty and wired.

**P1 (0):** None ŌĆö every audited route resolves to a real, non-empty file, and the interactive pages (status/support) fetch real data with designed loading/empty/error states.

**Top P2 (content/links to fix):**
1. Blog footer regression ŌĆö ~22 of 28 posts load footer.css but omit `#footer-container` + footer.js, so the site footer never renders.
2. Dead `/ibm/*` links ŌĆö IBM blog posts (and /support's bare `/ibm` link) point to `/ibm`, `/ibm/galaxy`, `/ibm/oracle`, `/ibm/proof`, `/ibm/trust-layer`, `/ibm/vision`; only `/ibm/x402-demo` exists.
3. Orphaned posts ŌĆö `blog/decision-optimization-3d-ai-crypto.md` and `blog/internets-second-species.md` are `.md`-only, unreachable via the `.html`-only blog route.
4. Orphaned doc ŌĆö `docs/syndication.md` reachable only via one inline link in listings.md, not the docs nav.
5. RSS subscribe link `/rss/announcements.xml` ŌĆö no local generator writes the XML; prod rewrite to `/api/rss/announcements` should be verified.

---

<a id="sec-080"></a>

> **Source:** `docs/audits/FINDINGS.md` ┬Ę [Ōåæ table of contents](#table-of-contents)

# Master findings ŌĆö three.ws page audit

Consolidated, severity-ranked list across all seven group docs
([01](01-main.md)ŌĆō[07](07-learn-blog-legal.md)). Auditors ran read-only; fixes
landed afterward. **Status** reflects the live worktree, which had a concurrent
multi-agent fix sweep running during this audit ŌĆö items marked *fixed
(concurrent)* were corrected by another agent on `main` while this audit was in
flight and were verified gone before this doc was written.

Audited: ~115 interactive routes + docs/blog/legal/machine surfaces.
**Coin rule: clean platform-wide** ŌĆö the only Solana mint hardcoded anywhere is
`$THREE` (`FeMbDoX7R1Psc4GEcvJdsbNbZA3bfztcyDCatJVJpump`). Zero foreign-token
references in code, copy, samples, or docs. No true P0s.

## Severity tally

| Sev | Count | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| P0 | 0 | none found |
| P1 | ~70 | incl. one stored-XSS, three hard-rule violations (fixed), feed-failure UX cluster |
| P2 | ~50 | a11y on data tables, missing focus states, copy, mobile |
| P3 | ~40 | cross-link opportunities, adjacent features |

---

## Tier 1 ŌĆö hard-rule violations & security (all resolved)

| # | Issue | File | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Stored XSS** ŌĆö character name/description/symbol/author/image_url injected into `innerHTML` unescaped | `src/characters.js:30-82` | **Fixed (this audit)** ŌĆö added `escHtml`/`safeUrl`, escaped every user field, `encodeURIComponent` on id href |
| 2 | **Fallback sample array on `/`** ŌĆö `FALLBACK_AGENTS` fabricated named agents ("Ansem ŌĆö Trader persona", etc.) rendered when `/api/explore` is thin/down | `pages/home.html:5562` | **Fixed (this audit)** ŌĆö removed array; showcase degrades to its real CTA cards (Browse all / Make your own) |
| 3 | **Broken skeleton rendered as literal text** ŌĆö `${Array.from(...)}` sat in static HTML, so users saw the raw template string; fetch had no try/catch ŌåÆ infinite spin on network throw | `pages/marketplace-analytics.html:137,143`, `src/marketplace-analytics.js:110` | **Fixed (this audit)** ŌĆö static skeleton rows; fetch + top-level `.catch` now route to the error state |
| 4 | **Fake progress stages** ŌĆö `setInterval` cycled "Generating queriesŌĆ”/SearchingŌĆ”/Computing verdictŌĆ”" unconnected to real work | `src/fact-checker-app.js:257-285` | **Fixed (concurrent)** ŌĆö replaced with one honest indeterminate status; verified |
| 5 | **Fabricated bazaar listings** ŌĆö on x402-bazaar failure, `discoverServices()` invented competitor services rendered as a live bazaar | `api/demo-economy.js:81-107` | **Fixed (concurrent)** ŌĆö degrades to `bazaarAvailable:false` + the one real briefing service; verified |

## Tier 2 ŌĆö dead links (resolved)

| # | Issue | File | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| 6 | `/ibm/galaxy` (no such route) on the IBM feature CTA + footer | `pages/features.html:1058,1266` | **Fixed (this audit)** ŌåÆ `/galaxy` (routed in vercel.json:861) |
| 7 | `/ibm/galaxy` badge/degradation links | `pages/constellation.html`, `pages/agent-economy.html` | **Fixed (concurrent)** ŌåÆ `/galaxy` |
| 8 | `/ibm/trust-layer`, `/docs/ibm` dead links | `pages/agent-exchange.html`, `pages/avatar-wallet-chat.html`, `pages/agent-economy.html` | **Fixed (concurrent)** |
| 9 | Nav pointed at `/pages/*.html` (404 in prod ŌĆö prod serves clean routes) | `pages/shopper.html:411-416` | **Fixed (concurrent)** ŌåÆ clean routes |

## Tier 3 ŌĆö open follow-ups (not yet fixed)

These are real, lower-severity, and several touch files under active concurrent
edit ŌĆö left open and tracked rather than risk clobbering in-flight work.

- **[P1] Feed-failure UX cluster** ŌĆö several live feeds keep stale data or spin
  forever instead of surfacing a recoverable error/retry: `/oracle` graph,
  `/smart-money`, `/pump-dashboard` channel feed, `/pumpfun` SSE,
  `/pump-visualizer` SSE. `/pump-live` reconnects correctly ŌĆö copy its pattern.
  (Several of these files were under concurrent edit during the audit.)
- **[P1] `/play/agent-wallet` dead in prod** ŌĆö `BRIDGE_URL` is empty for any
  non-localhost host, so the headline "your avatar pays" flow is unreachable for
  real visitors. Needs a deployed bridge URL or an honest "dev-only" state.
- **[P1] `/avatar-artifact` unusable on mobile** ŌĆö zero media queries,
  full-screen canvas, mouse-only. Add touch controls + a mobile layout.
- **[P1] `/create-agent` permanent dead page on module parse failure** ŌĆö the
  `#page-loading` veil never clears if the module throws at parse. Add a
  load-failure fallback that clears the veil and shows a retry.
- **[P1] `/create/selfie` silent `catch {}`** ŌĆö avatar fetch + name/visibility
  saves swallow errors (stuck viewer / lost edits). Surface recoverable errors.
- **[P2] Blog footer regression** ŌĆö ~22 of 28 posts load `footer.css` but never
  render the footer element. Good candidate for a single scripted pass over
  `blog/*.html`.
- **[P2] Data-table a11y** ŌĆö `/oracle`, `/activity`, `/leaderboard`,
  `/trending`, `/smart-money` use `<div>` grids / label-less rows missing
  `scope`/`aria-label`/semantic roles. Best in class: `/radar`, `/trades`,
  `/strategy-lab`.
- **[P2] `/lookup` off-brand** ŌĆö hardcoded light theme, no nav/footer, dead-ends
  to external explorers with no on-platform agent-profile link.
- **[P2] `/collection`** ŌĆö one remaining unescaped field (`collection.js`).
- **[P3] Island pages** ŌĆö `/demo`, `/live`, `/avatar-wallet-chat`, vanity
  grinders lack cross-links to `/agents` / `/launches` / agent profiles.
- **[P3] Marketing copy accuracy** ŌĆö `features/deploy.html` brands the schema
  "ERC-8004" while it's Solana/Metaplex Core; `studio.html` FAQ points at an
  unrouted `/agent-embed`; `ar.html` `/docs/ar` soft-404s in the docs SPA.

## Rejected false positives (recorded so they aren't re-raised)

- USDC / SOL / BTC as x402 settlement rails are **not** coin-rule violations ŌĆö
  they're payment plumbing, not promoted coins.
- `/login`, `/register` auth is fully wired (`src/privy-login.js` exists and is
  served); the "missing module" P0 was wrong.
- Home links `/forge`, `/radar`, `/pose`, `/marketplace` all resolve.
- `/embed.html`, `/community`, `/legal/privacy`, `/legal/tos` all resolve.
- `/studio`, `/widgets` demo fixtures are real (`/api/widgets/...`), not mocks.
- Root `llms.txt` (0 bytes) is **not** served ŌĆö `/llms.txt` serves the generated
  67 KB `public/llms.txt`. The empty root file is stale-but-harmless (P3 delete).
